name: GBrain
description: GBrain tools and OpenClaw OAuth-backed media extraction route.

gbrainBin.description: Path to the gbrain executable. Defaults to gbrain on PATH.

openclawBin.description: Path to the openclaw executable. Defaults to openclaw on PATH.

workingDir.description: Working directory for spawned gbrain/openclaw commands.

envFile.description: Optional dotenv-style env file loaded into spawned commands. Defaults to ~/.gbrain/gbrain.env.

extractionModel.description: OpenClaw provider/model used for OAuth-backed extraction.

timeoutMs.description: Maximum milliseconds for GBrain/OpenClaw subprocess calls.

maxConcurrentExtractions.description: Maximum extraction subprocesses running at once. Defaults to 1.

extractionQueueLimit.description: Maximum queued extraction requests before returning a busy response. Defaults to 8.

extractionQueueTimeoutMs.description: Maximum time an extraction request can wait in queue. Defaults to 30000.

minExtractionIntervalMs.description: Minimum delay between extraction starts. Defaults to 0.

maxExtractionFileBytes.description: Maximum decoded bytes accepted for a file passed to /plugins/gbrain/extract. Defaults to 8000000 and is capped at 20MiB.
